com.mentor.chs.plugin.table

Interface IXTableData

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXTableCommonData

    public interface IXTableData
extends IXTableCommonData
    Interface representing a table data model for tables driven via Capital Extensibility architecture. It should be implemented for all table plug-ins.
    Since:
    July 09, 2007
    Version:
    1.0

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.Object getCellValueAt(int rowIndex, int colIndex)
      The cell data value at a given location in the table.
      int getRowCount()
      The total number of data rows in the plug-in table.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.table.IXTableCommonData

        getColumnCount, getHeaderCount, getHeaderValueAt

    • Method Detail

      • getRowCount

        int getRowCount()
        The total number of data rows in the plug-in table. Data rows does not include any header row.
        Returns:
        int The number of data rows in the plug-in table.

      • getCellValueAt

        java.lang.Object getCellValueAt(int rowIndex,
                                int colIndex)
        The cell data value at a given location in the table. It does not include any header cell value. Do not return null value from this method. In case of null value, return an empty string.
        Parameters:
        rowIndex - Index of the row.
        colIndex - Index of the column.
        Returns:
        Object The data value at the given location. Only String, int and double are supported return types for cell data value.
